utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh come on guys , it is not like I moved to Europe ! I just moved across the hall ! And

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ahh ! Are not you dressed yet ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: We are supposed to meet my parents in 15 minutes .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah okay , I was just talking to the guys . Just look at them I mean , is it okay if they come visit ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_is it okay if they come visit ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh right , your allergies . All her , she hates you .
